reviews.review_description:
A fun game to pick up and play trying to beat your highscore, or chasing that coveted gold trophy on a level.
Some levels are easy, some are hard, some are hard until you figure out how to best throw a bag then they become easier.
Interesting and different leveldesigns makes gameplay more varied.
Wish it had a multiplayer option.

This developer has taken the essence of cornhole and morphed it into many more enjoyable and much more fascinating variants of cornhole. The graphics are simplistic but the physics and gameplay are very clever.

I don't have boundless experiences with VR games but this Cornhole Training Sim has provided hours of fun. I can honestly say that no other examples come to mind when I think of games that elicit actual, verbal feedback from me while playing. I've lost count of the number of times I've shouted when a bag *just* missed the board or the hole on what would have been the point(s) that pushed me from a silver trophy to a gold on a level. 

Getting the gold on a specific level you've been trying on for a while is also an immensely rewarding feeling that makes all of the prior frustration feel worth it. 

Like any game of its kind, this game has stronger and weaker levels but they all feel well thought-out and most include some sort of noticeable gimmick that makes the level memorable in some way or another. 

The DLC levels all provide a nice change of pace with the piratey/coastal theme and the underwater levels definitely made me feel more conscious of my breathing. 

For a free game, I'd say it's well worth your $0. If you enjoy the vanilla levels, the DLC is more of the same (only different). I think I'd give those levels a slight edge over the base game in terms of atmosphere/level design but again, the whole experience is wonderful!
The fo trial is completely pointless. Just throw very lightly and you’ll still miss. Not a fan.

developer_response.body:
Hello there!

There is a in-game setting that allows you to customize the throwing power to better configure it to your throwing motion. Did none of those settings match the throwing experience you were looking for?

reviews.review_description: This is a fun and surprisingly addictive game! The environments are unique and immersive, and what really makes it awesome is how the game mixes up mechanics so it's not just basic cornhole. Every level feels like a new challenge with different twists. It's easy to lose track of time as you get caught up in the mix of skill, strategy, and pure fun.

I really enjoy playing VR Cornhole Training. The venues are quite varied and unique. My favorites are the ones on the ice. This is not your everyday cornhole game. From fairly basic to "out-of-this-world", this game has something for everyone's skill level and interests.
This game lets me throw beanbags at boards in so many different ways! I appreciate the varied environments and mechanics. And the near-retro touches to the level selection interface are *chef's kiss*
